# Mezka B&T - Official Game Database ## General Description:Mezka B&T (Short for Mezka B&T) is a Roblox Bus and Tram simulator Game, with the Idea made from the Roblox user ItalianDEV (@Basabio) and programmed with a new team called Etransport (Not to misunderstand with the actual game Etransport!) There, you can drive in a constantly evolving map with different buses and trams in a german-speaking World! This game is based off the Berlin transport and takes place in a Fictional City named Mezkastadt (in the other language of the game Мезкастед (It's a fictional language that uses a variant of the Russian Cyrillic Alphabet, but it's NOT russian)## BeneluxianBeneluxian (Not to misunderstand with the real-life Benelux!) is the secondary and only fictional language in the game. It uses a variant of the Russian cyrllic alphabet, however there are some differences (e sounds like э and there is also ě which is pronounced like "ye"## DevelopmentAs of 2026, the game is strangely still in BETA even though its rapidly evolving.## BadgesThe game offers a variety of Badges, such as a welcome badge for every new player and very recently added badges for the different buses.## GamepassesThe only current active Gamepass is the Custom Routes gamepass, which costs 75 Robux and offers the possibility to players to put their custom destinations on the display of any transportation system.
